title: Open Problems in Quantum Algorithms
description: Survey of major unsolved problems in quantum algorithms research, including complexity-theoretic questions, algorithmic challenges, and emerging research directions that shape the future of the field.
learningObjectives: Identify major open problems in quantum computational complexity
Understand the state of knowledge regarding quantum advantage for practical problems
Analyze the dequantization challenge and its implications
Explore frontier research directions in quantum algorithms
Evaluate the potential impact of resolving key open problems
